contract: interview transcript summary, business identity, confirmed facts, unverified claims, missing answers, no build output

artifact.interviewSummary: Phase 0 discovery for Captains Fish and Chicken, a counter-service soul-food / fried-fish restaurant at 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids IA 52402 (owner Ray Aqel, opened Oct 2024). NAP and hours were corroborated across Yelp, Uber Eats, DoorDash, Grubhub, Postmates and local press (Cedar Rapids Gazette, KHAK); web hours match the brief exactly. Web research surfaced a real second location (3100 6th St SW, opened May 16 2025, phone 319-362-3114); the owner confirmed it is real but scoped it OUT — this website is for 1616 1st Ave NE only. Owner confirmed the web menu items are accurate but stated the delivery-app prices are NOT his and must not be presented as authoritative. Owner confirmed his multi-state track record (opened and sold the same concept in MN, IL, MI before Iowa). Owner corrected the web/Yelp implication of catering: there is NO catering. No halal or dietary claims. No current promotions. Brand: no logo (must be created), colors navy #0a3a5c and gold #f2a516, and no professional photos (all imagery must be generated in Phase 6). Conversion-surface gaps flagged and load-bearing for downstream gates: no lead-form endpoint and no business email (lead form cannot ship), phone is voice-only (dual-CTA degrades to call-only), fewer than six hard trust facts (trust grid omitted), and no analytics configured. No domain and no hosting chosen yet. Local neighborhood/competitor detail was not provided by the owner and is deferred to Phase 1 research.

businessIdentity.name: Captains Fish and Chicken
businessIdentity.cuisine: soul food / fried fish and chicken
businessIdentity.serviceModel: counter-service; order at counter; primarily takeout / to-go

outOfScopeLocation.note: Real second location, owner-confirmed. Excluded from this site per single-location brief scope. Do not reference in NAP or schema for this build.

brand.photos: none — no professional food/interior/exterior photos; generate all imagery in Phase 6

userConfirmedFacts.fact: Name: Captains Fish and Chicken (legal entity: Captains Fish and Chicken, INC)
In-scope address: 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402
Phone: (319) 221-1040 — regular voice line, NOT SMS/text-capable
Owner: Ray Aqel
Opened October 2024 (soft opening late Oct 2024)
Hours: Sun 11:00-20:00; Mon-Thu 11:00-22:00; Fri-Sat 11:00-23:00 (web matches brief)
Counter-service model; primarily takeout / to-go
Owner opened and sold the same concept in Minnesota, Illinois, and Michigan before Iowa; first Iowa location

Menu items are accurate (see menu object). Chicken: fried chicken, tenders, boneless wings, bone-in wings, gizzards. Seafood: perch, tilapia, catfish, cod, calamari, crab cakes, shrimp. Sides: okra, hush puppies, onion rings, breaded mushrooms, fries, cheese curds. Dessert: chocolate cake.
Everything made fresh to order; restaurant recommends calling ahead for faster service
Second location at 3100 6th St SW is real (opened May 2025) but OUT OF SCOPE; site is 1616 only
No catering offered
No halal or dietary claims
No current promotions or specials
Brand colors: navy #0a3a5c and gold #f2a516; no logo yet (create); no professional photos
Three value props: made fresh to order; does both fish and chicken right; family-owned
Mid-page CTA banner line: 'Call ahead — your order's hot when you arrive.'
Online ordering happens via third-party delivery apps (DoorDash, Uber Eats, Grubhub, Postmates); these are CTAs, not owned pages
No Google Ads; no Google Analytics configured
No domain and no hosting chosen yet
